AIConfiguration.msdyn_customconfiguration:
{"version":"GptDynamicPrompt-2","prompt":[{"type":"literal","text":" You are a product launch risk analyst. Analyze the following launch data and 
generate a brief risk assessment.
 
 Launch Name: "},{"type":"data","id":"lc_launch.lc_name","text":"lc_launch.name"},{"type":"literal","text":" 
 Launch Status: "},{"type":"data","id":"lc_launch.lc_launchstatus","text":"lc_launch.launchstatus"},{"type":"literal","text":" 
 Related Milestones: "},{"type":"data","id":"lc_launch.lc_launch_lc_milestone_lc_launchid.lc_milestonestatus","text":"lc_launch.Launch (lc_milestone).milestonestatus"},{"type":"literal","text":" 
 Related Status Updates: "},{"type":"data","id":"lc_launch.lc_launch_lc_statusupdate_lc_launchid.lc_summary","text":"lc_launch.Launch (lc_statusupdate).summary"},{"type":"literal","text":" 
 
 Instructions:
 1. Identify any milestones that are "Blocked" or "At Risk" include the "},{"type":"data","id":"lc_launch.lc_launch_lc_milestone_lc_launchid.lc_name","text":"lc_launch.Launch (lc_milestone).name"},{"type":"literal","text":" 
 2. Flag any concerning patterns in status updates
 3. Provide a one-sentence overall risk summary
 
 Keep the response under 3 sentences.
"},{"type":"inputVariable","id":"PromptColumnRecordId"}],"definitions":{"inputs":[{"id":"PromptColumnRecordId","text":"PromptColumnRecordId","type":"text","quickTestValue":""}],"formulas":[],"data":[{"id":"lc_launch","displayName":"lc_launch","type":"dataverseTable","filters":[{"filterType":"equal","attribute":"lc_launchid","valueType":"inputVariable","value":"PromptColumnRecordId"}]}],"output":{"formats":["text"]}},"modelParameters":{"modelType":"gpt-5-reasoning","gptParameters":{"temperature":1}},"settings":{"recordRetrievalLimit":30,"shouldPreserveRecordLinks":null,"runtime":null},"code":""}
